positive: A stylized illustration of a cosmic nebula dissolving into a blooming sunflower, rendered in a clean, graphic art deco style. The composition should feature the sunflower at the center, its petals radiating outward like cosmic arms, formed from swirling galaxies and stardust. Use a color palette of deep indigo, electric violet, warm gold, and vibrant yellow. The art should have strong, clean silhouettes, high contrast linework, and a mystical, ethereal glow. The overall aesthetic should be suitable for a minimalist yet impactful t-shirt print, highly detailed but readable from a distance. Poster print quality, vector illustration, symmetrical composition, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, grainy, watermark, logo, text, low detail, bad anatomy, signature, artifact, noise, dirty, overexposed, cartoonish, photorealistic
